LightningComponentBundle.description: A Lightning Web Component that displays contact information in a card format with avatar, name, title, email, phone, and action buttons. Implements SLDS 2.x design patterns with full accessibility support.
LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: Contact Card with Avatar Name and Title

property.name: name
property.label: Contact Name
property.description: The full name of the contact

property.name: title
property.label: Contact Title
property.description: The job title or role of the contact

property.name: email
property.label: Email Address
property.description: The email address of the contact

property.name: phone
property.label: Phone Number
property.description: The phone number of the contact

property.name: avatarUrl
property.label: Avatar URL
property.description: URL to the contact's profile image

property.name: avatarInitials
property.label: Avatar Initials
property.description: Fallback initials for the avatar (e.g., JD for John Doe)
